title: bauera rubioides var. humilis
intro: Bauera rubioides var. humilis is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to Tasmania and southeastern Australia, belonging to the family Cunoniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating skin conditions. Bauera rubioides var. humilis is typically prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water for its herbal remedies, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs for enhanced effects.
